## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content strategy and SEO approach for hyper.mode and dgraph.io](https://fathom.video/share/1DoCDbE2s4pPiv9Av2dw8W9Vxfew3c64?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on creating high-quality "pillar" content pieces that establish authority on key topics like knowledge graphs](https://fathom.video/share/1DoCDbE2s4pPiv9Av2dw8W9Vxfew3c64?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Identify long-tail keywords and create clusters of related content linking back to pillar pieces](https://fathom.video/share/1DoCDbE2s4pPiv9Av2dw8W9Vxfew3c64?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Leverage dgraph.io's existing authority to build links to hyper.mode content](https://fathom.video/share/1DoCDbE2s4pPiv9Av2dw8W9Vxfew3c64?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Explore topics like knowledge graphs, graph databases, distributed databases from different angles (use cases, challenges with existing solutions, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/1DoCDbE2s4pPiv9Av2dw8W9Vxfew3c64?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Knowledge Graphs

  - [Defining knowledge graphs, their characteristics, and applications across industries](https://fathom.video/share/1DoCDbE2s4pPiv9Av2dw8W9Vxfew3c64?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
  - [Roles/personas interested in knowledge graphs (architects, engineers, data professionals)](https://fathom.video/share/1DoCDbE2s4pPiv9Av2dw8W9Vxfew3c64?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
  - [Pain points leading people to explore knowledge graphs (data relationships, schema flexibility, performance/scalability)](https://fathom.video/share/1DoCDbE2s4pPiv9Av2dw8W9Vxfew3c64?tab=summary&timestamp=1985.0)
  - [Next steps after realizing need for knowledge graph (finding examples, comparing to traditional approaches)](https://fathom.video/share/1DoCDbE2s4pPiv9Av2dw8W9Vxfew3c64?tab=summary&timestamp=2237.0)

### Graph Databases

  - [Limitations of relational/NoSQL databases for graph data (join queries, representing relationships)](https://fathom.video/share/1DoCDbE2s4pPiv9Av2dw8W9Vxfew3c64?tab=summary&timestamp=2001.0)
  - [Benefits of graph databases (schema flexibility, traversal performance, evolutionary data modeling)](https://fathom.video/share/1DoCDbE2s4pPiv9Av2dw8W9Vxfew3c64?tab=summary&timestamp=2126.0)
  - [Specific use cases well-suited for graphs (social networks, recommendations, hierarchies)](https://fathom.video/share/1DoCDbE2s4pPiv9Av2dw8W9Vxfew3c64?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)
  - [Roles looking at graph databases (architects, developers)](https://fathom.video/share/1DoCDbE2s4pPiv9Av2dw8W9Vxfew3c64?tab=summary&timestamp=1820.0)

### Distributed Databases

  - [Challenges with centralized database architectures at scale](https://fathom.video/share/1DoCDbE2s4pPiv9Av2dw8W9Vxfew3c64?tab=summary&timestamp=2342.0)
  - [Benefits and trade-offs of distributed database approaches](https://fathom.video/share/1DoCDbE2s4pPiv9Av2dw8W9Vxfew3c64?tab=summary&timestamp=2342.0)
  - [Specific distributed data needs (multi-region, fault tolerance, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/1DoCDbE2s4pPiv9Av2dw8W9Vxfew3c64?tab=summary&timestamp=2342.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to generate list of potential long-tail topics to review](https://fathom.video/share/1DoCDbE2s4pPiv9Av2dw8W9Vxfew3c64?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)
  - [Collaborate on developing a "What is a Knowledge Graph?" pillar piece](https://fathom.video/share/1DoCDbE2s4pPiv9Av2dw8W9Vxfew3c64?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
  - [Explore creating a "Graph RAG" example app deployed on dgraph.io and hyper.mode](https://fathom.video/share/1DoCDbE2s4pPiv9Av2dw8W9Vxfew3c64?tab=summary&timestamp=2302.0)
  - [Kevin to post more "building in public" updates mixing personal experience with hyper.mode development](https://fathom.video/share/1DoCDbE2s4pPiv9Av2dw8W9Vxfew3c64?tab=summary&timestamp=3265.0)
